replies.msg:
Before Fame
She met Rakitic the day before he signed with Seville Football Club while waitressing at a hotel bar. After meeting her, he stated to his brother "I'm going to sign the contract tomorrow... and I'm going to marry that waitress."

Trivia
She has become insanely popular on Instagram with more than dedicated 500,000 fans.

Family Life
After marrying Rakitic in April 2013, their daughter, Althea, was born only four months later. Their second daughter, Adara, was born in 2016.
